approach.summary: Hybrid Hindi spell classification using dictionary checks, script validation, character-sequence heuristics, and confidence bucketing.

words_classification.note: Confidence-band totals can be recomputed by rerunning build_q3_live_report from spell_check_results.csv.

low_confidence_review.note: Reviewed from low-confidence sample using explicit rule-based adjudication from token/script evidence.
